observations.summary: The tension between Dan's determined ascent ('Up, he thought. Even if it kills me. Even if I'm ground to dust on the way. Up.') and the grounding force of the earth that threatens to crush or resist him.

left_evidence.quote: Up, he thought. Even if it kills me. Even if I'm ground to dust on the way. Up.

right_evidence.quote: Even if I'm ground to dust on the way.
